hospital_info.name: MedCare General Hospital
hospital_info.address: 742 Wellness Boulevard, Healthcare District, Metro City - 400001

operating_hours.lab: Monday to Saturday, 7:00 AM - 9:00 PM, Sunday 8:00 AM - 2:00 PM

departments.name: Cardiology
departments.description: Our Cardiology department provides comprehensive heart care including diagnostics, interventional procedures, and cardiac rehabilitation. Equipped with state-of-the-art catheterization labs and non-invasive cardiac imaging.
departments.head: Dr. Rajesh Sharma

departments.name: Orthopedics
departments.description: The Orthopedics department specializes in bone, joint, and muscle disorders. We offer advanced treatments including minimally invasive surgeries, joint replacements, and sports medicine.
departments.head: Dr. Priya Malhotra

departments.name: General Medicine
departments.description: Our General Medicine department handles a wide range of health conditions including fever, infections, diabetes management, hypertension, and preventive health check-ups.
departments.head: Dr. Anand Krishnan

departments.name: Pediatrics
departments.description: The Pediatrics department provides specialized medical care for infants, children, and adolescents. Our child-friendly environment ensures comfortable visits for young patients.
departments.head: Dr. Sunita Verma

departments.name: Gynecology & Obstetrics
departments.description: Comprehensive women's health services including prenatal care, delivery, gynecological surgeries, and fertility treatments. Our maternity ward provides a comfortable birthing experience.
departments.head: Dr. Neha Gupta

departments.name: Dermatology
departments.description: Our Dermatology department treats skin, hair, and nail conditions. We offer both medical and cosmetic dermatology services using the latest technology.
departments.head: Dr. Kavita Reddy

departments.name: ENT (Ear, Nose, Throat)
departments.description: The ENT department provides comprehensive care for ear, nose, and throat conditions. We have advanced diagnostic and surgical facilities for both adults and children.
departments.head: Dr. Vikram Mehta

departments.name: Ophthalmology
departments.description: Our Eye Care department offers comprehensive eye examinations, laser treatments, and surgical procedures for all age groups.
departments.head: Dr. Aisha Patel

departments.name: Neurology
departments.description: The Neurology department specializes in disorders of the brain, spinal cord, and nervous system. Our neurologists use advanced diagnostic tools for accurate diagnosis and treatment.
departments.head: Dr. Sanjay Iyer

departments.name: Psychiatry & Mental Health
departments.description: Our mental health department provides confidential and compassionate care for psychological and psychiatric conditions. We offer therapy, counseling, and medication management.
departments.head: Dr. Meera Joshi

faqs.question: How do I book an appointment?
faqs.answer: You can book an appointment through our website, by calling +91 22-4567-8900, or by walking in to the reception. Our AI video assistant can also help you book appointments instantly. Online booking is available 24/7.

faqs.question: What are the visiting hours?
faqs.answer: General visiting hours are from 10:00 AM to 12:00 PM and 4:00 PM to 6:00 PM daily. ICU visiting is limited to 11:00 AM - 11:30 AM and 5:00 PM - 5:30 PM with a maximum of 2 visitors at a time.

faqs.question: Do you accept insurance?
faqs.answer: Yes, MedCare General Hospital accepts all major insurance providers including Star Health, HDFC ERGO, ICICI Lombard, New India Assurance, Max Bupa, and Bajaj Allianz. We also have a dedicated insurance desk to help with cashless claims.

faqs.question: Is there parking available?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have a multi-level parking facility with 500+ spots. Parking is free for the first 2 hours for OPD patients. Valet parking is also available at the main entrance.

faqs.question: Do you have emergency services?
faqs.answer: Yes, our Emergency department operates 24/7, 365 days a year. We have a fully equipped trauma center with 24/7 availability of emergency surgeons, anesthesiologists, and critical care specialists. Call +91 22-4567-8911 for emergencies. We also have ambulance services.

faqs.question: Can I get an online consultation?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer telemedicine consultations through our video platform. You can book an online appointment through our website or app. Online consultations are available for most departments except Emergency and procedures requiring physical examination.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept cash, all major credit and debit cards, UPI payments (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm), net banking, and EMI options for major procedures. We also offer payment plans for expensive treatments.

faqs.question: How do I get my medical reports?
faqs.answer: Medical reports can be collected from the lab department 24-48 hours after the test. Reports are also sent to your registered email and available on our patient portal. For urgent tests, reports are available within 4-6 hours.

faqs.question: Do you have a pharmacy?
faqs.answer: Yes, our in-house pharmacy operates 24/7 and stocks a wide range of medicines. We offer a 10% discount on all medicines for hospital patients. Home delivery of medicines is also available.

faqs.question: What about COVID-19 precautions?
faqs.answer: We follow strict infection control protocols including mandatory masking in clinical areas, regular sanitization, temperature screening, and dedicated isolation wards. COVID-19 testing and vaccination services are available.

appointment_rules.booking_advance: Appointments can be booked up to 30 days in advance
appointment_rules.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 4 hours before the appointment. Late cancellation may incur a fee of Rs. 200.
appointment_rules.rescheduling: Free rescheduling up to 2 hours before the appointment, subject to availability.
appointment_rules.walk_in: Walk-in patients are accommodated on a first-come-first-served basis, subject to doctor availability. Wait times may vary.
appointment_rules.follow_up: Follow-up consultations within 7 days of the initial visit are charged at 50% of the consultation fee.
appointment_rules.documents_required: Please bring a valid photo ID, insurance card (if applicable), and any previous medical records or reports.
